---
title: "NC-Style Trajectory Figure"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{NC-Style Trajectory Figure}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(trajfigR)
library(ncfigR)

cells <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/trajectory_cells.tsv", package = "trajfigR"))
branches <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/branch_probabilities.tsv", package = "trajfigR"))
trends <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/gene_trends.tsv", package = "trajfigR"))
transitions <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/state_transitions.tsv", package = "trajfigR"))
velocity <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/velocity_vectors.tsv", package = "trajfigR"))

fig <- compose_trajectory_figure(cells, branches, trends, transitions, velocity)
export_figure_bundle(fig, "trajectory_overview", out_dir = "figures/exports", width = 7, height = 5)
```
